name: Burgers Florentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare spinach according to package instructions; drain well. Toast the English muffins and keep them warm.
2. Preheat the broiler if recommended by the manufacturer. Tear the bread into small pieces in a bowl. Add the spinach, ground beef, egg, salt, and onion. Mix well. Shape the mixture into four 1-inch thick round patties. Place the patties on the rack of the broiling pan.
3. Broil the patties for about 5 minutes on each side until medium or to desired doneness. Just before the patties are done, cut the mozzarella cheese into 4 slices. Top each meat patty with a cheese slice and continue broiling for an additional minute or until the cheese melts.
4. To serve, place a patty on the bottom half of each muffin and replace the top half of the muffin.
